title: Female bust reduction in Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Female bust reduction in Rebuild?             Quote Post by Leighton » Sun Mar 13, 2011 10:11 am I cbf getting pictures to compare NGE animations to the Rebuild ones at the moment. Is it just me or have the animators reduced the bust of the females in rebuild? I think theyve reduced Asuka and Rei's curves. Bust also being crucial to Misato's figure, i feel like theres something missing. Not enough sexual innuendo in the Rebuild movies perhaps?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Mar 13, 2011 10:15 am Flat chest is the new moe.

[]:             Quote Post by Leighton » Sun Mar 13, 2011 10:26 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: Flat chest is the new moe.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Mar 13, 2011 10:45 am Uhh, the breast size is just more consistent than in original. Rei and Asuka both have tits but they're sizes are this time around actually fixed and stay same, unlike in NGE. Misato still has huge jugs. anyway, what's up with all these 2D complexy discussions going around the forum today...

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sun Mar 13, 2011 10:46 am Hadn't noticed a difference, but it could be attributed to better-quality animation reducing the need to hit the audience over the head with quantity.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Mar 13, 2011 11:13 am Leighton wrote: edit: by the way, who's the lovely lady in your avatar? from which anime?

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Sun Mar 13, 2011 11:38 am Rebuild characters look thinner. Ritsuko looks much much more sexy in the classic version. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Mar 13, 2011 11:55 am Ritsuko wrote: Rebuild characters look thinner.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sun Mar 13, 2011 12:13 pm I like where this thread is going. Let me know when we get to the part where we start comparing the measurements of the breasts. That'll show...the oversea animators?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Mar 13, 2011 12:20 pm C.A.P. wrote: I like where this thread is going. Let me know when we get to the part where we start comparing the measurements of the breasts. That'll show...the oversea animators?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Mar 13, 2011 4:12 pm Ritsuko wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Mar 13, 2011 4:47 pm Relevant. It's too bad that thread no longer has the pictures. The comparison shots Zuggy had were pretty good.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Mar 13, 2011 5:22 pm Rei in the NGE image looks slightly cross-eyed

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Mar 13, 2011 5:27 pm I hadn't really noticed a difference were busts are concerned between Rebuild and NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 13, 2011 8:49 pm "Closer to Sadamoto's original designs" is not fully correct. Sadamoto actually REDREW those designs for NME. Among other changes, the characters' proportions are more naturalistic.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sun Mar 13, 2011 8:58 pm Evas and boobies are made from the same material in the Evangelion. What size they end up being varies moment to moment.

[]:             Quote Post by Leighton » Sun Mar 13, 2011 8:59 pm Asuka Comparison (even though in episode 9 i think the bust size was exaggerated for a more sexually evokative effect) Episode 9 NGE [URL=http://img689.imageshack.us/i/screenshot20110314at125.png/] [/URL] [URL=http://img156.imageshack.us/i/screenshot20110314at125.png/] [/URL] REBUILD 2.22 - Definitely a lot skinnier [URL=http://img198.imageshack.us/i/screenshot20110314at125.png/] [/URL] [URL=http://img815.imageshack.us/i/screenshot20110314at125.png/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Mar 14, 2011 4:48 am Ritsuko wrote: Again, now she is thin. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Mon Mar 14, 2011 6:09 am Allemann wrote: Ritsuko looks male in this picture. Must be the jaw.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Mar 14, 2011 7:18 am Definitely a lot skinnier
